name: Undo
problem: After a destructive or significant action, users need a clear, time-bound way to reverse it.
accessibility_requirements: undo affordance is keyboard reachable and labeled
announce action and undo availability via aria-live
do not rely on a disappearing toast as the only recovery path
performance_budget: instant undo response; toast render under one frame
success_criteria: undo reverses the action with no data loss
undo window is communicated and accessible without a pointer
